prs.title: feat: upgrade app to agentic AI with RAG-based engagement strategies
AddedPersonalized repos, fixed package version issues

issues.title: CMI issue with latest version of mysql
issues.body:
**Description of issue:**
CMI is not able to connect to latest version of mysql which is 8.0.26.

---

**ERROR (DELETE IF YOU HAVE NO ERROR):**
```
[05:18:50 WARN]: java.sql.SQLNonTransientConnectionException: Could not create connection to database server. Attempted reconnect 3 times. Giving up.
[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.mysql.cj.jdbc.exceptions.SQLError.createSQLException(SQLError.java:110)

[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.mysql.cj.jdbc.ConnectionImpl.connectWithRetries(ConnectionImpl.java:903)
[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.mysql.cj.jdbc.ConnectionImpl.createNewIO(ConnectionImpl.java:828)

[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.mysql.cj.jdbc.ConnectionImpl.getInstance(ConnectionImpl.java:246)

[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.Zrips.CMI.Modules.DataBase.DBConnectionPool.getConnection(DBConnectionPool.java:34)

[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.Zrips.CMI.Modules.DataBase.DBMySQL.<init>(DBMySQL.java:44)
[05:18:50 WARN]:        at com.Zrips.CMI.Modules.DataBase.DBManager.startMysql(DBManager.java:228)

```


---

**Cmi Version (using`/cmi version`):** 
```
4.0.9.2
```

**Server Type (Spigot/Paperspigot/etc):** 
```
Purpur
```

**Server Version (using `/ver`):** 
```
1.16.5
```
